articles.title: In Caracas, this feels like the hardest moment in Venezuela's modern history
articles.description: Rescue teams are working ceaselessly to reach those trapped under rubble. But as hope fades, anger is growing.

articles.title: Hundreds of Heathrow and Gatwick flights delayed due to thunderstorms
articles.description: More than 800 flights have been delayed at Heathrow and Gatwick, many due to stormy weather south of the UK.

articles.title: Are we in for a summer of serial heatwaves?
articles.description: Forecasters have suggested that summer is likely to be warmer than average with an increased chance of more heatwaves, as Simon King explains.

articles.title: Mahmood announces new refugee sponsorship route into UK
articles.description: The home secretary says "capped safe and legal" routes would help to restore confidence in the asylum system.
